title: ROCode Context Docs Registry
description: Registry file for the context_docs tool. Each library entry points to a docs index file.

libraryId.description: Stable canonical identifier used by context_docs queries.

aliases.description: Alternative names used by resolve_library matching.

sourceFamily.description: Logical source family such as official_docs, mdn, framework_docs, library_docs.

defaultVersion.description: Default version hint surfaced by resolve_library and page resolution.

homepage.description: Homepage or docs landing page URL.

indexPath.description: Path to the docs index JSON, resolved relative to this registry file if not absolute.
